ip_outcome_note: No IP flag. Item card depicting an optical scope gadget.

trivia_bullets.text: Vivid Voltage is the fourth Sword & Shield series expansion, released November 13, 2020 in English. The set's headline feature was Pikachu VMAX (Gigantamax Pikachu) and the introduction of Amazing Rare cards featuring Legendary and Mythical Pokemon. Telescopic Sight is an uncommon trainer item in the same set. [Bulbapedia: Vivid Voltage TCG, via WebSearch; Pokemon.com: Vivid Voltage announcement, via WebSearch]

Telescopic Sight is a Pokemon Tool granting +30 damage to attacks against Benched Pokemon V and Pokemon-GX specifically. It is one of the few tools that rewards targeting the bench rather than the active, making it a component in snipe-damage strategies that chip away at high-HP V cards before they become the active. [Pojo.com: Telescopic Sight review, via WebSearch; Limitless TCG: VIV 160, via WebSearch]
sources: Pojo.com: Telescopic Sight Vivid Voltage review

trivia_bullets.text: Illustrated by Toyste Beach (also the artist on Urn of Vitality in Battle Styles). The concentric red-green-yellow ring design renders the scope as a toy-like cartoon gadget — consistent with the Vivid Voltage set's colorful, high-saturation visual identity. [Frontmatter artist field]
